protection.title: 1. Copyright Protection
protection.content: All content, software, and materials available on this website and associated products (collectively, the "Content") are protected by intellectual property laws and are the property of WinGlows. This includes, but is not limited to:
items: All Obsidian plugins (CreatorFlowz, RSSFlowz, PluginFlowz, MediaFlowz, EditorFlowz, MailingFlowz, LinkFlowz)

license.title: 2. License Restrictions
license.content: Purchase of our products grants you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license for personal use only. This license explicitly prohibits:
items: Copying, modifying, or creating derivative works
Reverse engineering or decompiling our software
Removing copyright notices or product identifications
Using our code in other products or services
Sharing access credentials or license keys

commercial.title: 3. Commercial Use
commercial.content: Any commercial use, including but not limited to resale, modification, or incorporation into other products, requires explicit written permission from WinGlows.

enforcement.title: 4. Enforcement
enforcement.content: We actively monitor for copyright infringement and will take appropriate legal action to protect our intellectual property rights, including:
items: Reporting violations to relevant platforms and authorities

fairUse.title: 5. Fair Use
fairUse.content: Limited use of our Content may be permitted for review, commentary, or educational purposes, subject to proper attribution and respect for our intellectual property rights.

footer.notice: By using our products and services, you acknowledge and agree to respect our intellectual property rights as outlined in this notice. WinGlows reserves all rights not expressly granted and may update this notice at any time without prior notification.
footer.contact: For copyright inquiries or permissions, please contact copyright@winglowz.com
